info.name: LithoApp Backend Tests
info.description:
Complete end-to-end testing collection for LithoApp microservices.

Services covered:
  • Patient Service  — http://localhost:8086
  • Episode Service  — http://localhost:8085
  • Analysis Service — http://localhost:8082
  • Drainage Service — http://localhost:8084

Execution order: 01-Patient → 02-Episode → 03-Analysis → 04-Drainage

Dynamic IDs (patientId, inactivePatientId, episodeId, stoneAnalysisId, metabolicAnalysisId, drainageId) are stored as collection variables by test scripts and reused automatically in subsequent requests.

variable.description: Set by [P-10] Create Patient for Inactive Tests
